extensions.name: JioSaavn
extensions.description: JioSaavn 320kbps music provider — ideal for Indian, Bollywood, Tamil, Telugu music. Delivers FLAC-quality downloads.
extensions.author: SpotiFLAC

extensions.name: YouTube Music
extensions.description: YouTube Music via InnerTube API — worldwide catalog, 160kbps opus audio with FLAC conversion.
extensions.author: SpotiFLAC

extensions.name: Free HD Music (Demo)
extensions.description: Searches Free Music Archive and Internet Archive for legally free, high-quality tracks. Bundled with SpotiFLAC — always available.
extensions.author: SpotiFLAC

extensions.name: JioSaavn
extensions.description: Search and stream high-quality audio from JioSaavn's public API. Supports 320kbps MP3 and some FLAC tracks.
extensions.author: community

extensions.name: SoundCloud
extensions.description: Search SoundCloud's public catalog. Downloads available for tracks with open download permissions.
extensions.author: community

extensions.name: Bandcamp
extensions.description: Search and download FLAC/MP3 from Bandcamp artists who offer free downloads. Respects artist download permissions.
extensions.author: community

extensions.name: Internet Archive
extensions.description: Access millions of freely available audio recordings on archive.org — concerts, live bootlegs, historical recordings, and lossless FLAC.
extensions.author: community

extensions.name: SpotiFLAC Extension
extensions.description: Extension Registry for SpotiFLAC-Mobile. Browse, submit, and download community-built extensions.
extensions.author: spotiflacapp

extensions.name: YT Music SpotiFLAC
extensions.description: A high‑performance SpotiFLAC extension that adds YouTube Music as a source for search, metadata, and high‑quality audio downloads.
extensions.author: Amonoman

extensions.name: SpoitiLists
extensions.description: SpoitiLists — unofficial SpotiFLAC Mobile extension: your Spotify playlists & saved (liked) tracks on Home via Spotify Web API + OAuth PKCE. Custom Spotify search, open.spotify.com URLs. Install from Store with registry.json + spoiti-lists.spotiflac-ext. Playlist tracks refresh when opened; Home may cache briefly. MIT. Not Spotify or SpotiFLAC.
extensions.author: AlexRabbit

extensions.name: SpotifyFlac Native
extensions.description: A SpotiFLAC extension to download the songs directly from Spotify
extensions.author: Onlineraider
